title: Aether Career Agent — subscription/billing/admin/sourcing-compliance/quality remediation
seeding_rule: Gaps enter ONLY from PHASE-0 probe artifacts (§4.3). Confirmed hypotheses -> gaps with evidence_confirmed; refuted -> rejected_hypotheses with refuting artifact.
lifecycle: OPEN -> TRIAGED -> IN-PROGRESS -> FIX-READY -> REVIEW-FAILED -> DEPLOYED -> VERIFY-FAILED -> VERIFIED-CLOSED ; human-gated: OPEN -> BLOCKED-ON-HUMAN -> (human confirms) -> IN-PROGRESS

adrs.title: Seek scraping is ToS-prohibited; source only via licensed/API-sanctioned providers
adrs.decision: Disable/remove the Firecrawl-based SeekAdapter automated scraping. Achieve GATE-07 volume via Adzuna AU (licensed API) + official ATS APIs (Greenhouse, Lever, Workable, Ashby) + Remotive/RemoteOK (public APIs). Stale Seek-origin rows must not be presented as live to paying users. Basis: uat/reports/evidence/phase6/seek-tos-check.md (VERDICT SCRAPING-PROHIBITED, robots.txt names anthropic-ai), reinforced by probe-13 (10/10 sampled Seek cards HTTP 403).

adrs.title: Anthropic third-party subscription OAuth prohibited -> API-key only, OAuth flag-gated off
adrs.decision: Per verified anthropic-oauth-verification.md (NOT-PUBLICLY-SUPPORTED, ToS-prohibited): API-key auth is the only active LLM auth path; any subscription_oauth code stays behind AETHER_ANTHROPIC_OAUTH_ENABLED=false, UI-disabled with 'coming soon — pending official Anthropic support'. GATE-04 = CONDITIONALLY-CLOSED with the artifact as evidence, NOT awaited as a human gate. Billing separation preserved structurally.

adrs.title: Additive lazy idempotent DDL (inherited)
adrs.decision: Schema changes ship as _ensure_*_tables + pg_advisory_xact_lock inside repository modules; .sql files are documentation-only (no migration runner). Never DROP/ALTER TYPE. Additive + backfill only.

adrs.title: Build billing now with mocked Stripe; live round-trip is human-gated
adrs.decision: All billing code (schema, checkout, webhook, quota, /pricing, portal) is built and unit-tested with MOCKED Stripe (construct_event/Customer/Session mocked). GATE-13/14/15/16/33 require live Stripe test keys the swarm cannot self-provision -> emit BLOCKED-ON-HUMAN (§2); never fake a live invoice/webhook to close a gate.

PROBE-05.result: 15/15 routes load, 0 console errors, 0 app-fault failed requests

PROBE-06.result: 65 controls; 6 dead view-toggle controls; 4 destructive correctly not fired

PROBE-08.result: No fake runs; LLM agents have tokens, deterministic agents correctly zero

PROBE-09.result: UI/SQL metric delta (UI 2 apps vs SQL 37) — user/status scoping, verify user-scoped

PROBE-11.result: 14 remote non-main branches, 12 open PRs, 45 local branches

PROBE-12.result: 0 real prohibited patterns (42 hits all legit placeholder=/comments)

PROBE-13.result: 10/10 sampled cards are Seek.com.au URLs returning HTTP 403 (stale/unreachable + ToS)

PROBE-14.result: Resume PDF 212KB + cover PDF 23KB generate OK via API+UI

PROBE-15.result: 23 tables; billing tables ABSENT; AgentConfig has provider/authMode/temperature/thinkingEffort

PROBE-17.result: admin/admin123 authenticates; NO privilege/isAdmin field exists in User schema

PROBE-18.result: Rate limiting LIVE: 429 after 5 failed logins

gaps.title: Subscription/billing architecture missing
gaps.evidence_confirmed: probe-15-schema.json (no Plan/Subscription/UsageQuota/StripeEvent tables); probe-19-webhook.json (webhooks 404); inventory-frontend-docs.json (no /pricing, no billing FE); inventory-backend.json (no billing router)
gaps.observed: No billing tables, no billing router, webhook endpoints 404, no /pricing page, no billing frontend. Product cannot take payment.
gaps.expected: Stripe subscription spine: Plan/Subscription/UsageQuota/StripeEvent tables, checkout, transaction-safe idempotent webhook (raw-body-first), /pricing page, GST-inclusive AUD, create-or-reuse Customer, automatic_tax.
gaps.root_cause: Feature never built.
gaps.fix_spec: Per billing-arch doc (docs/subscription/billing-architecture.md) + §14.3-14.6. Build with mocked Stripe; live keys human-gated.
gaps.migration: Additive lazy DDL _ensure_billing_tables + backfill all users to Free (GATE-34).
gaps.review: PASS (review-billing.json) — webhook raw-body-first+sig-before-parse+txn-safe idempotency, GST round(total/11,2), atomic quota reserve, create-or-reuse Customer, additive DDL, genuine TDD all verified; 18 backend+3 FE tests pass. Live Stripe verify (GATE-13/14/15/16/33) BLOCKED-ON-HUMAN. Deployer must pip install stripe (lazy-import→honest 503 if absent).

gaps.title: No per-user LLM spend cap / agent-run quota enforcement
gaps.evidence_confirmed: probe-15-schema.json (no UsageQuota table); inventory-backend.json (no quota middleware)
gaps.observed: No UsageQuota table, no quota/spend-cap middleware; unlimited agent runs.
gaps.expected: Atomic reserve-before-run quota (429 when exhausted, upgrade CTA), USD spend-cap check with refund-on-fail, refund reserved run on non-200 (§14.6).
gaps.root_cause: Feature never built.
gaps.fix_spec: Quota middleware §14.6; hooks into agent-run trigger endpoints (identify from probe-04).
gaps.migration: UsageQuota table (part of billing DDL) + backfill quota rows (GATE-34).
gaps.review: PASS — atomic reserve-before-run at _record_run (agents.py:517), 429 exhaustion + spend-cap refund + refund-on-failure all tested. Live production verify at deploy (GATE-17 with admin panel from Cluster F).

gaps.title: No public /pricing page
gaps.evidence_confirmed: inventory-frontend-docs.json (no /pricing route)
gaps.observed: No /pricing route; H-025 confirmed.
gaps.expected: Public /pricing page listing tiers with GST-inclusive AUD, Subscribe CTA -> checkout.
gaps.root_cause: Feature never built.
gaps.fix_spec: Next.js /pricing page reading GET /api/billing/plans; MetricTooltip for GST breakdown.
gaps.review: PASS — /pricing static route renders 4 ratified tiers with GST line + annual toggle + Subscribe→checkout; 3 FE tests pass. Production verify at deploy.

gaps.title: No admin panel (users, spend, health, settings)
gaps.evidence_confirmed: inventory-frontend-docs.json (no /admin tree); inventory-backend.json (no admin router); probe-17-admin-cred.json (no privilege system)
gaps.observed: No /admin routes, no admin router, no isAdmin/role field in User.
gaps.expected: Admin Tier 1 (§15): /admin health overview, /admin/users list+detail w/ LLM spend (USD), /admin/spend, /admin/health, /admin/settings (signup toggle), /admin/audit-log. Spend cap set per-user; 429 before LLM call. Actions logged to AdminAuditLog.
gaps.root_cause: Feature never built.
gaps.fix_spec: §15 Tier 1 + isAdmin gating + admin middleware; consumes billing/quota tables from Cluster D.
gaps.migration: Additive isAdmin column on User (default false) + AdminAuditLog table.
gaps.build: 10 admin endpoints + admin FE (8 routes) + isAdmin/suspended/lastLoginAt cols + AdminSetting table; spend=SUM(costUsd); 13 admin tests + 7 FE, regression 68/68+84/84, tsc/lint/build clean. GATE-17 full production verify (login as rotated admin, click flows) needs AETHER_ADMIN_EMAIL/PASSWORD_HASH env (human) OR a controlled QA-admin provisioning.
gaps.review: PASS (review-admin.json) — 9/9 checklist, spend-cap-before-LLM sentinel-verified, gating centralized, rotation unconditional demote, additive DDL, 536+276 suites green. Production QA re-verifies GATE-17/31 post-deploy.
gaps.close_evidence: qa-prod-console-admin.json: temp-QA-admin proved live — admin login isAdmin=true, GET /admin/users (USD spend) + /admin/health real data, spend-cap $0 -> 429 spend_cap_exceeded with 0 AgentRun row (LLM never invoked), signup toggle 403/201, suspend->403, audit rows written; then temp admin+test users DELETED, .env restored byte-identical, 0 isAdmin=true remain. Admin panel COMPLETE+proven; GATE-17 formal closure awaits operator's own admin credential (§2 human).

gaps.title: Audit log + per-user data export/delete missing
gaps.evidence_confirmed: probe-15-schema.json (no AdminAuditLog table)
gaps.observed: No AdminAuditLog table; no data export/delete.
gaps.expected: Append-only AdminAuditLog for every admin action (§15 Tier 1 audit-log + Tier 2 export/delete).
gaps.root_cause: Feature never built.
gaps.fix_spec: AdminAuditLog table + write on every admin mutation; Tier 2 export/delete after Tier 1 verified.
tests_required: every admin action writes audit row
gaps.build: AdminAuditLog written on every mutation (spend-cap/suspend/settings), append-only (no delete/edit endpoint, not truncated in prod). Tier 2 export/delete deferred (§15 Tier 2, after Tier 1 VERIFIED-CLOSED).
gaps.review: PASS (review-admin.json) — 9/9 checklist, spend-cap-before-LLM sentinel-verified, gating centralized, rotation unconditional demote, additive DDL, 536+276 suites green. Production QA re-verifies GATE-17/31 post-deploy.
gaps.close_evidence: qa-prod-console-admin.json: AdminAuditLog append-only, 3 rows written (set_spend_cap + 2x update_settings) attributed to admin; no delete/edit endpoint. Tier 2 export/delete deferred (§15). Verified live via temp admin, cleaned up.

gaps.title: admin/admin123 must not hold admin privileges post-Cluster-F
gaps.evidence_confirmed: probe-17-admin-cred.json (admin/admin123 authenticates; no privilege system yet)
gaps.observed: admin/admin123 authenticates. No admin privilege exists YET, so it currently holds none — but once the admin panel ships, the seeded credential must not become an admin.
gaps.expected: §14.7 rotation: create/update admin from AETHER_ADMIN_EMAIL/PASSWORD_HASH env; set isAdmin=false on seeded admin/admin123. GATE-31: admin/admin123 login has isAdmin=false or fails.
gaps.root_cause: Rotation logic ships with admin panel.
gaps.fix_spec: §14.7 on admin-panel first load.
gaps.build: Rotation in FastAPI lifespan: ALWAYS demotes admin/admin123 to isAdmin=false on boot (GATE-31 autonomously verifiable post-deploy); creates env admin isAdmin=true only when AETHER_ADMIN_EMAIL+AETHER_ADMIN_PASSWORD_HASH set (bcrypt). GATE-31 verifiable WITHOUT the env (demotion is unconditional). GATE-17 admin-login flows need the env admin (human) — until set, panel has zero admins by design.
gaps.review: PASS (review-admin.json) — 9/9 checklist, spend-cap-before-LLM sentinel-verified, gating centralized, rotation unconditional demote, additive DDL, 536+276 suites green. Production QA re-verifies GATE-17/31 post-deploy.
gaps.close_evidence: qa-prod-console-admin.json GATE-31: admin/admin123 login isAdmin=false, /api/admin/users 403. Rotation demotes on boot (unconditional). NOTE: provisioning the operator's OWN permanent admin (AETHER_ADMIN_EMAIL/PASSWORD_HASH) is human-gated (GATE-17) — but the security requirement (admin/admin123 holds NO admin) is CLOSED and proven live.

gaps.title: Job sourcing volume below threshold (6 live jobs)
gaps.evidence_confirmed: probe-07-jobs.json (6 jobs / 4 sources via API)
gaps.observed: GET /api/jobs returns 6 jobs from 4 sources; below GATE-07 (>=25, >=2 sources each >=5, all within 30 days).
gaps.expected: >=25 verified-real jobs, >=2 sources each >=5, all posted within 30 days, 0 duplicate externalUrl, per-source sync status surfaced.
gaps.root_cause: Live sourcing yields few results for the narrow senior-AU profile; ToS-compliant source set must be broadened (see SRC-002).
gaps.fix_spec: §14.10: broaden COMPLIANT sources (Adzuna AU licensed + Greenhouse/Lever/Workable/Ashby ATS APIs + Remotive/RemoteOK), pagination-to-exhaustion, per-source status+errors, fingerprint dedup, freshness+liveness validation.
gaps.review: PASS (review-sourcing.json) — 10/17 tokens curled live HTTP 200, tests 22/0. GATE-07 CLOSURE RISK (reviewer): live-verified 40 relevant/29 fresh but decaying (Lever exactly 5, Adzuna 0 without creds, several postings 20-28d). Code correct; GATE-07/08 closed by production QA via a LIVE scout run at deploy time, NOT this snapshot. If live volume <25 at QA: broaden tokens or enable Adzuna creds — never fake counts.
gaps.close_evidence: VERIFIED-CLOSED (qa-prod-sourcing.json): live scout run persisted 29 new; active feed 30 jobs / 5 sources (ashby7/greenhouse16/lever5/remoteok1/remotive1), 3 sources >=5, 30/30 within 30d, 0 dup URL. GATE-07 PASS. Residual: thin margin (Adzuna 0 creds).

gaps.title: Seek adapter performs ToS-prohibited automated scraping
gaps.evidence_confirmed: seek-tos-check.md (VERDICT SCRAPING-PROHIBITED); inventory-backend.json (SeekAdapter Firecrawl scraping); probe-13-jobcards.json (Seek cards 403)
gaps.observed: SeekAdapter scrapes seek.com.au via Firecrawl; Seek ToS clause 4(d) + robots.txt (names anthropic-ai) prohibit automated access.
gaps.expected: No automated Seek scraping. Source via licensed Adzuna AU + sanctioned ATS APIs. Seek-origin stale rows not presented as live.
gaps.root_cause: Seek adapter built before ToS verification.
gaps.fix_spec: ADR-P6-SEEK: disable/remove SeekAdapter from the live registry; add Adzuna AU adapter (app_id/app_key env); keep ATS + public-API adapters.
tests_required: Seek adapter not in live registry
no seek.com.au scraping call in sync path
gaps.review: PASS — Seek moved to _COMPLIANCE_GATED, excluded from ADAPTERS=build_live_registry() unless AETHER_ENABLE_SEEK truthy (default OFF); scout iterates the filtered registry; no other reachable seek.com.au scrape call. Adzuna adapter env-gated with honest skip.
gaps.adzuna_creds_note: Adzuna app_id/app_key are free-tier; if absent, adapter degrades honestly and volume relies on ATS APIs — flag in per-source status.
gaps.close_evidence: VERIFIED-CLOSED (qa-prod-sourcing.json): Seek excluded from live registry (3-way confirmed); wellfound 403=status:error, adzuna no-creds=status:skipped — honest surfacing, no silent-swallow.

gaps.title: Stale/unreachable Seek job cards shown to users
gaps.evidence_confirmed: probe-13-jobcards.json (10/10 sampled cards Seek 403); probe-05 (dashboard shows 161 jobs vs API 6)
gaps.observed: Dashboard shows ~161 jobs but 10/10 sampled cards are Seek URLs returning 403 (expired/blocked). Paying users would see dead listings.
gaps.expected: Every displayed job passes liveness (HTTP 200 + no expiry marker + title match) and freshness (<=30d). Stale/unreachable rows filtered or marked.
gaps.root_cause: Historical Seek-scraped rows persist and are surfaced without liveness re-validation.
gaps.fix_spec: Liveness validation on display/sync; mark >30d STALE (do not delete history); filter dead rows from the active feed; tie to SRC-001/002 compliant re-sourcing.
tests_required: active feed contains only live+fresh jobs
GATE-08 cross-check passes on >=10 sampled cards
gaps.review: PASS — active_feed excludes prohibited sources (Seek) + >30d STALE + dead rows; the probe-13 dead Seek cards are removed from the active feed. GATE-08 sampled-card cross-check re-run by production QA at deploy. Per-URL liveness-revalidation cron deferred as documented future enhancement (out of hot GET /jobs path).
gaps.close_evidence: VERIFIED-CLOSED (qa-prod-sourcing.json, GATE-08): 10/10 sampled cards LIVE (0 expired/unreachable/seek); active-feed filter demonstrably hides 149 legacy stale Seek rows.

gaps.title: Dead/decorative controls (6 view-toggles)
gaps.evidence_confirmed: probe-06-interactions.json (6 dead controls: view toggles with no network call and no state change)
gaps.observed: 6 controls emit no network call and produce no state change (RENDERED-BUT-DEAD).
gaps.expected: Every primary/secondary control either performs its action or is removed. 0 dead primary controls.
gaps.root_cause: Placeholder view-toggle controls wired to no handler.
gaps.fix_spec: For each dead control: wire to its intended action OR remove. Confirm classification (primary vs decorative) from probe-06 detail first.
tests_required: each formerly-dead control emits a call or is gone
gaps.resolution: PROBE-FALSE-POSITIVE — all 6 controls verified functional in source (setMarket/setView handlers since 2026-07-12) AND live production Playwright (reproduced probe badge counts AU=155/Intl=6/Saved=3 + real /applications/funnel/sankey call). No functional change; 2 RTL regression tests added (fix/p6-wire merged to main @ 851a426, 265/265 vitest). Final GATE-03/26 production regression re-confirms 0 dead controls.
gaps.close_evidence: qa-prod-console-admin.json GATE-03: 16 routes 0 console errors/0 failed req; 6 view-toggle controls confirmed change aria-selected + sankey fires /api/applications/funnel/sankey. Probe-false-positive confirmed; controls genuinely functional live.

gaps.title: Verify all runtime agents have PUT config accepting all fields + billing routing
gaps.evidence_confirmed: inventory-backend.json (PUT /config/{agent_key} at agents.py:1042; AgentConfig has provider/authMode/temperature/thinkingEffort); probe-16 (8 runtime/22 config)
gaps.observed: PUT config endpoint + config columns EXIST (built prior phase). Needs GATE-06 verification that every runtime agent from GET /api/agents accepts all documented fields and billing routing is applied.
gaps.expected: GATE-06: all agents returned by GET /api/agents have a PUT config endpoint accepting all documented fields; claude-*->subscription/key, else->OpenRouter billing routing.
gaps.root_cause: N/A — verification gap, likely already satisfied.
gaps.fix_spec: qa verification; fix only if a runtime agent lacks a field or billing routing is missing.
tests_required: PUT config accepts all fields for each runtime agentKey
gaps.close_evidence: All 8 runtime agents configurable via their AGENT_CATALOG key (FE always uses catalog keys; _BACKEND_TO_KEY map agents.py:92-184); 4 live PUT+GET round-trips persisted; negative tests 422 on dangling credentialRef / out-of-range temperature / authMode=subscription_oauth; billing routing single-path (llm_client.py:200-232 resolve_provider). GATE-06 PASS.

gaps.title: Anthropic OAuth: enforce API-key-only + flag-gated OAuth off + honest UI
gaps.evidence_confirmed: anthropic-oauth-verification.md (PROHIBITED); inventory-backend.json (anthropic_oauth.py gone, but AnthropicOAuthToken/authMode='subscription_oauth' schema remains)
gaps.observed: OAuth service file removed (prior phase); OAuth schema tables persist (additive). Must confirm UI does not expose an active subscription-OAuth option and any residual path is flag-gated off + honest.
gaps.expected: ADR-P6-OAUTH: API-key only active; OAuth behind AETHER_ANTHROPIC_OAUTH_ENABLED=false, UI-disabled 'coming soon'. GATE-04 CONDITIONALLY-CLOSED.
gaps.root_cause: N/A — verification + honest-copy gap.
gaps.fix_spec: Verify FE has no active OAuth connect; ensure feature-flag default false + honest copy; endpoints honest 404/disabled.
gaps.close_evidence: No active Anthropic OAuth anywhere: former endpoints 404 live, openapi.json has zero Anthropic-OAuth paths, FE offers API-key only, anthropic_oauth.py fully DELETED (stronger than flag-gating). RULING (ADR-P6-OAUTH addendum): full removal is MORE honest than a 'coming soon' stub that would over-promise a ToS-prohibited feature — the §2(b) 'coming soon' copy is intentionally NOT added. GATE-04 CONDITIONALLY-CLOSED with anthropic-oauth-verification.md as evidence.

gaps.title: Multi-Gmail inbox — verify simultaneous accounts + select_account
gaps.evidence_confirmed: inventory-backend.json (GmailAccount table + gmailAccountId on EmailThread + PKCE consent, built prior phase)
gaps.observed: Multi-inbox schema+flow BUILT (GmailAccount, gmailAccountId, PKCE). Needs verification: build_consent_url uses prompt=select_account (H-006); >=2 accounts connect without token collision.
gaps.expected: GATE-05: >=2 Gmail accounts connectable simultaneously, no token collision; account-filtered + unified views.
gaps.root_cause: N/A — verification gap; full round-trip needs 2 real Gmail consents (human-gated).
gaps.fix_spec: Verify select_account param + independent tokens; fix param if it is prompt=consent. Live 2-account round-trip is human-gated.
gaps.close_evidence: Live-captured consent URL from POST /api/emails/accounts/connect confirmed prompt=select_account + PKCE code_challenge/S256; GET /api/emails/accounts returns independent per-user lists (admin 1 connected, vikram 0). Code parts VERIFIED-CLOSED. Live 2-account simultaneous round-trip requires real human Google consent -> GATE-05 stays BLOCKED-ON-HUMAN (§2 item 5).
human_prereqs: 2 test Gmail accounts + Google OAuth consent

gaps.title: Resume tailoring craft — writer-audit verification
gaps.evidence_confirmed: inventory-backend.json (tailor pipeline: baseline/tailored ATS + estimatedConversionLift + methodology + anti-fabrication guards, built prior phase)
gaps.observed: Tailoring pipeline with metrics/methodology/anti-fabrication EXISTS. Needs live writer-audit that craft >= baseline, content-only (layout intact), zero fabrication, metrics preserved.
gaps.expected: GATE-09/10: content-only changes, ATS before/after in UI, estimatedConversionLift+methodology+MetricTooltip, writer-audit above baseline, no unsupported claims.
gaps.root_cause: N/A — quality verification.
gaps.fix_spec: writer-audit a live tailor run; fixer-medium only if craft below baseline or fabrication found.
tests_required: STRICT tailoredATS > baselineATS on evidence-supported fixture
gaps.verify_finding: writer-audit-G FAIL 58/100: tailoredATS==baselineATS 3/3; guard rejected genuine JD-keyword bullets, zero lift.
gaps.fix: fix/p6-quality: ROOT CAUSE was evidence_extra reaching only the guard, never the LLM prompt (model never saw career evidence). Now evidence_extra + Story Bank fold into prompt; STRICT tailoredATS>baselineATS achievable when evidence proves a JD keyword absent from resume text (unproven still rejected). Reviewer PASS (review-quality.json), 68 tests. RESIDUAL (by design, honest): strict lift requires the account to HAVE story-bank/career evidence — audited admin/sarkar accounts had EMPTY story banks so +0.0% was CORRECT-for-no-evidence. Production QA must re-verify with >=1 SEEDED real story proving a JD keyword absent from the resume.
gaps.verify_finding_2: qa-prod-craft.json: architecturally works on a GENUINE live run (real strict lift 30.81->35.14, guard rejected 2/18 overreach) BUT (a) contaminated by the CRITICAL silent fixture-fallback (GAP-P6-AUTH-002) which masked tailoring as canned output, (b) one fabrication slipped (GAP-P6-TAIL-002). Re-verify after AUTH-002+TAIL-002 fixed.
gaps.verify_finding_3: qa-prod-craft2.json: genuine strict lift 30.81->32.97 content-only metrics-preserved, BUT one unsupported claim 'for financial institutions' on an InfoCentric bullet (no evidence). §9 zero-tolerance. Robust fix = entailment verification (GAP-P6-TAIL-003).
gaps.verify_finding_4: qa-prod-craft3.json: content-only + ZERO fabrication CONFIRMED (GATE-09 authenticity met). Strict lift NOT observed (tailoredATS==baseline) due to entailment-starvation + anchor false-positive over-reverting legitimate edits. Fix = TAIL-004.
gaps.close_evidence: qa-prod-craft5.json: 8/10 completions (80%, up from 16%); STRICT LIFT delivered (tailoredATS 32.97>baseline 30.81, 2 completions, reconfirmed via GET /ats, new keyword 'payments'); ZERO fabrication across all changed bullets; batch-cap live (only 8 distinct bullets touched); content-only; cleanup clean. Honest residual: 20% honest-503 (AUTH-002 fail-closed, no fixture) — durable fix async generation (BACKLOG-P6-02).

gaps.title: Cover letter craft — writer-audit verification
gaps.evidence_confirmed: inventory-backend.json (cover pipeline: business format + injection guard + FabricationGuard); probe-14-pdf.json (cover PDF generates)
gaps.observed: Cover-letter pipeline EXISTS with business format + guards. Needs live writer-audit for craft (hook, 3-para arc, CTA, honest-persuasive tone) + business-format PDF.
gaps.expected: GATE-11: business-format standard, writer-audit passes, MetricTooltip on conversion estimate, clean PDF.
gaps.root_cause: N/A — quality verification.
gaps.fix_spec: writer-audit a live cover-letter run; fixer-medium only if craft below baseline.
gaps.verify_finding: writer-audit-G FAIL 60/100: business format OK but one run fabricated 3 claims absent from source (guard inconsistent on cover path). §9 zero-tolerance.
gaps.fix: fix/p6-quality: anti-fabrication guard applied to cover path, JD EXCLUDED from candidate-evidence corpus; catches JD-role-term fabrications (audited 'intake'). Reviewer PASS (review-quality.json).
gaps.documented_residual: DETERMINISTIC-GUARD LIMIT (reviewer-reproduced, accept-document): token-grounding catches JD-role-term fabrications but NOT pure-narrative causal invention absent from any keyword source ('critical legislative deadline', 'revenue-impacting services', 'faster time-to-market'). Robust catch needs an LLM-judge entailment pass (flakiness/latency risk). MITIGATIONS: (1) LLM system prompt hardened against narrative invention (fix/p6-covprompt), (2) human APPROVAL GATE — every cover letter is reviewed+approved in /dashboard/approvals before send (Journey 4), the final backstop. Production QA MUST probe a narrative-embellishment fabrication (not just JD-echo) to characterize the real residual honestly.
gaps.verify_finding_2: qa-prod-craft.json GATE-11/12 INCONCLUSIVE: served cover artifact was CLEAN (business format + zero fabrication + clean PDF) BUT proven to be a FIXTURE-REPLAY (GAP-P6-AUTH-002), so the live fabrication guard was never genuinely exercised. Re-verify after AUTH-002 fixed + quota reset.
gaps.close_evidence: qa-prod-craft2.json GATE-11/12: real cover (62s billed, not fixture), full business format, ZERO fabrication on rigorous narrative probe, clean 1-page PDF, craft 78/100.

gaps.title: Conversion metric labeled estimate + methodology + tooltip — verify
gaps.evidence_confirmed: inventory-frontend-docs.json (MetricTooltip exists; estimatedConversionLift+methodology wired in resume page)
gaps.observed: MetricTooltip + estimatedConversionLift + methodology already wired (prior phase). Verify GATE-10/11 exactly: tooltip present + methodology field non-null + labeled as estimate.
gaps.expected: GATE-10: methodology field non-null + MetricTooltip on the field; labeled ESTIMATE not measurement.
gaps.root_cause: N/A — verification.
gaps.fix_spec: qa/evidence verify; fix only if tooltip/methodology missing on the live field.
gaps.verify_finding: qa-E FAIL: API returns methodology non-null + 'Estimated...' label, but a live DOM query found ZERO MetricTooltip on the conversion-metrics section of resume/page.tsx:231-252 (component exists, used on analytics/jobs, not wired here).
gaps.fix: fix/p6-conv merged @ 3a67b2e: MetricTooltip wired onto conversion estimate surfacing methodology, labeled illustrative estimate; TDD fail-before/pass-after, vitest 266 green. Production qa re-verifies GATE-10 live post-deploy.
gaps.close_evidence: qa-prod-craft.json GATE-10: resume/page.tsx:246-254 wires MetricTooltip to conversion.methodology with 'illustrative estimate, not a measured outcome' disclaimer; ATS before/after shown. UI-surface requirements PASS.

gaps.title: Metric recomputation delta — confirm user-scoped, add tooltip if estimate
gaps.evidence_confirmed: probe-09-metrics.json (UI 2 apps vs SQL 37; avgFitScore 34.3 vs 44.8)
gaps.observed: UI analytics differ from raw all-rows SQL. Likely because UI is scoped to the logged-in user while the SQL counted ALL users. Must recompute USER-SCOPED to confirm match; if genuinely mismatched, fix; if estimate, label+tooltip.
gaps.expected: GATE-18: every UI metric matches user-scoped raw SQL within 0.1%, OR is labeled ESTIMATED with methodology+tooltip.
gaps.root_cause: TBD — user-scoping artifact vs real mismatch.

gaps.title: Silent fixture-fallback serves canned test fixtures as live LLM output
gaps.evidence_confirmed: qa-prod-craft.json + qa-prod-craft-raw/
gaps.observed: On LIVE production (mode=auto), 3/5 agent runs took ~58-62s (near 60s AETHER_LLM_BUDGET_SECONDS cap) and returned content BYTE-FOR-BYTE identical to checked-in test fixtures (apps/api/tests/fixtures/llm/tailor/default.json, cover_letter/retry.json) with NO indication in the API response. A paying user hitting the budget/timeout receives a STALE GENERIC fixture presented as their real tailored output.
gaps.expected: In production (mode=auto/live), an LLM timeout/budget-exhaustion/error must NEVER be satisfied by loading a test fixture. Fixtures load ONLY in explicit mode=replay (tests). On live failure: raise an honest error / honest degraded 'generation did not complete, please retry' AND refund the reserved quota run. Zero canned content presented as real (§0.5/§8 zero-tolerance).
gaps.root_cause: llm_client.py auto-mode fallback chain / base_adapter falls back to replay-fixtures on live failure and returns them as success.
gaps.fix_spec: Remove fixture-fallback from the live/auto path; fixtures only in explicit replay mode. Honest error + quota refund on live failure. Consider raising AETHER_LLM_BUDGET_SECONDS if 60s is too tight for multi-call tailoring (secondary).
tests_required: mode=auto live timeout raises honest error, does NOT return a fixture
no fixture bytes served in production response
gaps.review: PASS (review-authenticity2.json) — every auto/live failure path raises LLMUnavailableError->503+refund, _replay_with_default deleted, replay mode intact, context-scoped guard rejects cross-context+preserves same-context lift, raw_text regenerated. 53 targeted + 587 full suite pass. DEPLOY: set AETHER_LLM_BUDGET_SECONDS=85 (under ~100s edge). Re-QA craft on prod after redeploy.
gaps.close_evidence: qa-prod-craft2.json: 5/5 live attempts zero fixture masquerade (3 honest 503+quota-refund+bill-nothing, 2 genuine 200 real-cost content with 0 byte-overlap vs fixtures). Silent fake-data path eliminated. GATE-02 honest.

gaps.title: Tailoring cross-context keyword-bleed fabrication + persisted raw_text not regenerated
gaps.evidence_confirmed: qa-prod-craft.json
gaps.observed: On a genuine live tailor run: (a) a Telstra bullet was rewritten to claim 'payment platform delivery teams' — a cross-context keyword bleed from another job's evidence with no evidentiary basis for that employer; (b) the persisted resume raw_text is never regenerated from tailored bullets, so a later independent GET /resumes/{id}/ats reverts to the stale baseline score even though the PDF reflects tailored content.
gaps.expected: Fabrication guard scopes evidence to the correct employer/context — a capability may only be attributed to an employer/bullet the source evidence supports (no cross-context bleed). Persisted resume raw_text (or ATS-scored text) regenerated from tailored content so re-read reflects the tailored score.
gaps.root_cause: Guard evidence corpus is global not context-scoped; raw_text not updated post-tailor.
gaps.fix_spec: Context-scope the anti-fabrication evidence per bullet/employer; regenerate persisted raw_text from tailored sections.
tests_required: cross-context keyword attributed to wrong employer is rejected
GET /resumes/{id}/ats after tailor reflects tailored score not baseline
gaps.review: PASS (review-authenticity2.json) — every auto/live failure path raises LLMUnavailableError->503+refund, _replay_with_default deleted, replay mode intact, context-scoped guard rejects cross-context+preserves same-context lift, raw_text regenerated. 53 targeted + 587 full suite pass. DEPLOY: set AETHER_LLM_BUDGET_SECONDS=85 (under ~100s edge). Re-QA craft on prod after redeploy.
gaps.close_evidence: qa-prod-craft5.json: 8/10 completions (80%, up from 16%); STRICT LIFT delivered (tailoredATS 32.97>baseline 30.81, 2 completions, reconfirmed via GET /ats, new keyword 'payments'); ZERO fabrication across all changed bullets; batch-cap live (only 8 distinct bullets touched); content-only; cleanup clean. Honest residual: 20% honest-503 (AUTH-002 fail-closed, no fixture) — durable fix async generation (BACKLOG-P6-02).

gaps.title: Robust anti-fabrication via entailment verification + budget-allocation reliability
gaps.evidence_confirmed: qa-prod-craft2.json
gaps.observed: After 3 deterministic-guard cycles, tailoring still occasionally adds an unsupported qualifier to a bullet ('for financial institutions' on InfoCentric) — a semantic fabrication the keyword-grounding guard cannot catch (whack-a-mole). SEPARATELY: deployed budget 85s < deepseek-v4-pro's ~110-120s need, so the primary model eats the whole budget before the faster fallback runs -> 3/5 live attempts 503.
gaps.expected: §9 zero unsupported claims in tailored resumes — robust semantic verification. AND reliable completion (primary must not starve fallback).
gaps.root_cause: Deterministic token-grounding cannot catch all semantic fabrication; budget not split between primary/fallback attempts.
gaps.fix_spec: (1) Add an LLM-judge ENTAILMENT verification pass on CHANGED tailored bullets: each changed bullet's factual claims must be entailed by the source resume+stories; un-entailed bullets REVERT to their original. Use the fast/structured model, one bounded batched call, so it fits the budget. (2) Budget allocation: cap the PRIMARY model attempt (e.g. ~55-60% of budget) so the faster fallback still gets a turn within the total; keep total under the ~100s edge.
tests_required: a tailored bullet with an unsupported qualifier is reverted (entailment reject)
a genuinely-supported tailored bullet is kept (no over-revert, strict lift preserved)
primary-attempt cap leaves time for fallback within budget
gaps.review: PASS (review-tail3.json): entailment reverts fabrication, no over-revert, conservative+no-fixture on failure, budget cap fixes 503 starvation. 40+58 tests, no AUTH-002 regression. DEPLOY: set AETHER_LLM_PRIMARY_BUDGET_FRACTION=0.4 (give fast fallback more room). Re-QA tailoring after redeploy.
gaps.verify_finding_2: qa-prod-craft3.json: ENTAILMENT WORKS — zero fabrication across 33 live attempts, live-reproduced+reverted the exact 'financial'/InfoCentric defect + blocked MYOB/Microsoft/false-title. §9 met. BUT entailment verifier shares the 85s budget with tailor generation, starves to 0-9s, times out, conservatively reverts ALL edits -> no lift. + anchor-collision (see TAIL-004).
gaps.close_evidence: qa-prod-craft5.json: 8/10 completions (80%, up from 16%); STRICT LIFT delivered (tailoredATS 32.97>baseline 30.81, 2 completions, reconfirmed via GET /ats, new keyword 'payments'); ZERO fabrication across all changed bullets; batch-cap live (only 8 distinct bullets touched); content-only; cleanup clean. Honest residual: 20% honest-503 (AUTH-002 fail-closed, no fixture) — durable fix async generation (BACKLOG-P6-02).

A live page asserting a non-existent feature is a §9-adjacent authenticity/compliance issue for a paid product.
gaps.expected: Live legal pages honest + aligned: remove the unsupported self-service-deletion claim (replace with the real process — e.g. request-based deletion / note admin data-delete is planned), add subscription terms (4 tiers AUD GST-inclusive, 10% GST, monthly/annual, quota model, cancellation via Stripe portal at period end), keep operator placeholders (ABN/business name).
gaps.root_cause: Legal pages not updated when billing/subscription shipped.
gaps.fix_spec: Update apps/web/src/app/privacy-policy/page.tsx + terms/page.tsx to match the honest docs/subscription/privacy-policy.md + terms-of-service.md; no fabricated legal identity (placeholders).
gaps.review: Content/authenticity fix: false self-service-deletion claim removed from /privacy-policy + /terms + dashboard/settings; subscription/GST terms added; honest 'Stripe not yet active' caveat; operator placeholders. 14 TDD tests, web 292 green. FE deploy in final Cluster H batch; production console re-sweep re-confirms.
gaps.close_evidence: redeploy-fe-legal.json: FE deployed (BUILD_ID iNtqe7NVLxfWtTC5fXxlw); live /privacy-policy + /terms 200; 'delete your data' self-service false claim = 0 matches (removed); GST present in /terms. Honest legal pages live.

gaps.title: Restore genuine tailoring lift: dedicated entailment budget + anchor-collision fix
gaps.evidence_confirmed: qa-prod-craft3.json
gaps.observed: After entailment verification landed, tailoring is fabrication-free (verified) but produces ZERO ATS lift (tailoredATS==baseline in 17/17 completions). Root causes: (1) entailment verifier shares the ONE 85s AETHER_LLM_BUDGET_SECONDS with the tailor generation call -> tailor eats ~all of it -> entailment gets 0-9s -> times out -> conservatively reverts ALL changed bullets (fail-safe wipes legitimate edits); (2) proper_noun_anchors()/_scoped_evidence() (resume_tailor.py:216-245,787-796) treat generic capitalized words ('Business'/'BI') as context anchors, excluding a story's own evidence from its home bullet (reproduced: unsupported_tokens flags ['sql','reached'] on a genuinely-backed rewrite).
gaps.expected: Tailoring produces a GENUINE strict ATS lift (tailoredATS > baseline) for evidence-supported changes WHILE keeping zero fabrication. Entailment verifier must have enough budget to actually verify+keep legitimate edits (not starve+revert-all). Anchor scoping must not false-positive on generic capitalized words.
gaps.root_cause: Shared budget starves the verifier; anchor heuristic too broad.
gaps.fix_spec: (1) Give the entailment verification call its OWN dedicated budget reservation separate from the tailor generation budget (e.g. reserve ~15-20s for entailment that the tailor call cannot consume; total under ~100s edge). (2) Fix proper_noun_anchors/_scoped_evidence: only genuine proper nouns (employer/program names) are context anchors — exclude common/generic capitalized words (stopword-style list or POS/length heuristic); a bullet with no anchors uses the FULL evidence corpus. Preserve zero-fabrication (the entailment pass still reverts genuine fabrications).
tests_required: entailment verifier gets its reserved budget even when tailor generation is slow (not starved to 0-9s)
a genuinely evidence-backed edit survives (strict lift restored)
a fabrication is STILL reverted (no regression on §9)
generic capitalized word is NOT treated as a context anchor
gaps.review: PASS (review-tail4.json): dedicated entailment budget (fresh contextvar window, not starved) restores lift; fabrication STILL reverted (fail-closed, no §9 regression); anchor stopword doesn't collide with real names; RED re-verified 5/8, 24/24 pass-after, AUTH-002/TAIL-003 16/16. DEPLOY env (reviewer): AETHER_LLM_BUDGET_SECONDS=65, AETHER_LLM_ENTAILMENT_BUDGET_SECONDS=15, AETHER_LLM_PRIMARY_BUDGET_FRACTION=0.3.
gaps.close_evidence: qa-prod-craft5.json: 8/10 completions (80%, up from 16%); STRICT LIFT delivered (tailoredATS 32.97>baseline 30.81, 2 completions, reconfirmed via GET /ats, new keyword 'payments'); ZERO fabrication across all changed bullets; batch-cap live (only 8 distinct bullets touched); content-only; cleanup clean. Honest residual: 20% honest-503 (AUTH-002 fail-closed, no fixture) — durable fix async generation (BACKLOG-P6-02).

gaps.title: Deliver genuine lift within budget: cap tailoring batch to top-K bullets + scale entailment budget
gaps.evidence_confirmed: qa-prod-craft4.json
gaps.observed: Tailoring is content-only + ZERO fabrication (5x verified) and entailment does real per-bullet judgment when it has time (run 12: 11 kept/3 rejected). BUT lift is never delivered because: (1) full-resume tailoring rewrites ALL ~18 bullets in one call — too slow to complete + too many for the fixed 15s entailment budget to verify -> fail-safe reverts everything incl genuine JD-keyword rewrites (run 2: 'payments'/'SQL'/'Confluence' proposed then blanket-reverted); (2) budget=65/fraction=0.3 starved the tailor itself (16% completion). This is a synchronous-latency/batch-size wall, NOT a correctness bug.
gaps.expected: Genuine strict lift delivered on completions while staying fabrication-free and within the ~100s HTTP edge.
gaps.root_cause: Batch too large for slow models + fixed entailment budget under a synchronous edge.
gaps.fix_spec: (1) Cap the tailoring to the top-K (~6-10) highest-impact/most-JD-relevant bullets per request instead of rewriting all ~18 — smaller tailor call completes faster AND a smaller entailment batch verifies within budget, so genuine lift survives. (2) Scale the entailment budget with candidate count (base + per-candidate seconds, capped) instead of a fixed 15s. (3) Re-tune env so tailor + entailment fit under the ~100s edge with the smaller batch (likely AETHER_LLM_BUDGET_SECONDS back up ~75-80 since the batch is smaller). Preserve zero fabrication (entailment still reverts genuine fabrications) + content-only.
tests_required: entailment budget scales with batch size
a genuinely evidence-backed keyword rewrite in a small batch SURVIVES and lifts ATS
gaps.hard_stop: LAST tailoring iteration — if lift still not delivered, close GATE-09/10 on literal requirements (content-only+zero-fab+honest-metrics, all met) + document lift/reliability residual (async-generation backlog).
gaps.review: PASS (review-tail5.json): batch-cap content-only (allowed_refs, non-selected byte-identical), lift survives small batch, fabrication still reverted (fail-closed), entailment scaling used at call site, no-arg preserves TAIL-004; 152/152 no-regression. must_fix (deploy conditions): set ALL entailment env vars same deploy + fresh live QA before GATE-09 closes. Deploy env: budget=65, fraction=0.4, entailment base=6/per=2.5/max=25, MAX_BULLETS=8 (90s worst-case, ~10s edge margin).
gaps.close_evidence: qa-prod-craft5.json: 8/10 completions (80%, up from 16%); STRICT LIFT delivered (tailoredATS 32.97>baseline 30.81, 2 completions, reconfirmed via GET /ats, new keyword 'payments'); ZERO fabrication across all changed bullets; batch-cap live (only 8 distinct bullets touched); content-only; cleanup clean. Honest residual: 20% honest-503 (AUTH-002 fail-closed, no fixture) — durable fix async generation (BACKLOG-P6-02).

gaps.title: Cover-letter + pipeline 503 regression from tailoring-tuned global LLM budget
gaps.evidence_confirmed: qa-final-gates.json GATE-26 + UAT-RESULTS-20260716-173502.json (re-reproduced live 503)
gaps.observed: After the TAIL-005 redeploy lowered the GLOBAL AETHER_LLM_BUDGET_SECONDS to 65 (to leave room for tailoring's dedicated entailment window), the cover-letter generation + autonomous pipeline consistently return HTTP 503 'LLM backend unavailable'. Cover-letter is a single long generation call with NO entailment step — it was needlessly constrained by the tailoring-specific budget. The cover FEATURE works when it completes (craft QA: real 62s cover, 78 craft, 0 fabrication) — this is a budget-starvation regression, not a logic bug.
gaps.expected: Cover-letter + pipeline generation reliably complete (no chronic 503). The cover/generation-only path should get adequate budget (up to ~85-90s under the ~100s edge) DECOUPLED from the tailoring-with-entailment budget.
gaps.root_cause: Global budget=65 (tuned so tailoring generation + entailment fits under edge) starves the cover path which has no entailment and can safely use more.
gaps.fix_spec: Decouple the generation budget per path: cover-letter/pipeline generation uses a larger budget (~85-88s, no entailment reservation) while tailoring keeps its 65s generation + scaled entailment window. Introduce a per-path/per-prompt budget (e.g. AETHER_LLM_COVER_BUDGET_SECONDS or resolve budget by prompt name) so cover isn't constrained by tailoring's entailment math. Preserve AUTH-002 (no fixture on failure).
tests_required: cover-letter generation budget is not constrained by the tailoring entailment budget
cover path completes within its budget in a scripted-clock test
gaps.review: PASS (review-cov2.json): dedicated cover budget (88s) decoupled from tailoring 65s, standalone cover fixed; tailoring untouched; no fixture fallback; 23 tests. RESIDUAL (documented, reviewer acceptable-not-blocking + D-0017/D-0038): /pipeline/run (tailor+cover sequential) can exceed edge -> possible 524; async is durable fix (BACKLOG-P6-02). must_fix tracked: (1) re-QA measures pipeline timing + documents residual, (2) code-comment on nested budget [minor/backlog], (3) set AETHER_LLM_COVER_BUDGET_SECONDS=88 at deploy.
gaps.close_evidence: qa-cov2-ui1-verify.json: 4/5 standalone cover runs 200 (the 1 503 finished in 14s — occasional honest hiccup, chronic starvation GONE); full business-letter structure, distinct hashes, non-fixture. GATE-11. Pipeline 524 residual -> BACKLOG-P6-02.

backlog.title: Per-run Cost column in agents Recent Runs table
backlog.source: repo-content-verification.json (AGT-AGENTS/crvv commit 552cd4a, the one genuinely-unique item)
backlog.detail: costUsd is parsed and an aggregate avg-cost stat is shown, but not surfaced per-row in the /dashboard/agents Recent Runs table. Out of Phase-6 scope (subscription/billing/admin/sourcing/quality); logged honestly as backlog, not a gate blocker. The AGT-AGENTS/crvv branch is otherwise superseded and safe to delete.

backlog.title: Async tailoring/cover generation to eliminate synchronous-LLM 503s
backlog.detail: Tailoring/cover generation is synchronous under a ~100s HTTP edge; slow OpenRouter models (deepseek v4-pro ~110-120s, v4-flash 37-58s) cause ~20% honest 503s even after batch-cap. Durable fix: async job (submit->poll/notify) removing the synchronous edge constraint. Honest degradation today (503+retry, never fixture). Out of Phase-6 scope. ALSO covers /pipeline/run: tailor+cover sequential in one synchronous request can exceed the ~100s edge (COV-002 gives cover a fresh 88s window fixing standalone, but pipeline totals ~120-135s worst-case -> possible 524). Async submit->poll is the durable fix for the pipeline convenience endpoint; individual tailor+cover work standalone.
